title: NeoOrigins Origin
description: An origin the player can pick. File path: data/<namespace>/origins/origins/<origin>.json.

name.description: Display name (translation key or literal). Defaults to origins.<namespace>.<origin>.name.

description.description: Display description (translation key or literal). Defaults to origins.<namespace>.<origin>.description.

icon.description: Item ID shown in the picker card. String form is shorthand for {item: ...}.

impact.description: Gameplay impact tier shown in the picker.

order.description: Sort order within the layer — lower = earlier.

powers.description: Power IDs granted when this origin is chosen. All must resolve to power JSONs under data/<namespace>/origins/powers/.

unchoosable.description: If true, not shown in the picker (granted only programmatically).

hidden.description: If true, origin is hidden from the picker but still valid if granted.
